\section{Professional Summary}
Software Development Engineer with \textbf{3 years} of experience in \textbf{Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC)}, \textbf{SOA Suite}, and \textbf{VBCS}, designing scalable microservices-based integrations and automation solutions. Proficient in \textbf{REST/SOAP APIs}, \textbf{event-driven architecture}, \textbf{CI/CD pipelines}, and \textbf{Agile/Scrum} methodologies, with strong focus on system reliability, integration patterns, and performance optimization.
